3146880.name: 피크? 삐끗!(Peak? Slip!)
3146880.description:
About This Game

Peak? Oops! is a unique card game that blends stylish action with rhythm-based gameplay.
Unlike traditional turn-based card games, you can actively participate even during your opponent’s turn.

Key Features

  • No More Waiting Turns
    Play rhythm mini-games during your opponent’s turn to gain additional advantages.

  • Rhythm Gameplay Meets Card Strategy
    Timing and strategy come together for a fresh and engaging experience.

  • Stylish Art and Visual Effects
    Enjoy flashy effects and a distinctive visual style that makes every battle exciting.

  • Easy to Learn, Hard to Master
    Accessible gameplay with deep card combinations and strategic choices.

Curious about mixing rhythm games with card strategy?
Jump into Peak? Oops! and experience a new kind of card battle today.
